zeroconf_confirm.title: Jung Home gateway discovered
zeroconf_confirm.description: Set up the Jung Home gateway at {host}? After you continue, approve the access request in the Jung Home app under Settings, Gateway, Access Permissions, Open Requests.

user.title: Connect to Jung Home
user.description: Enter the address of your Jung Home gateway. After you continue, approve the access request in the Jung Home app under Settings, Gateway, Access Permissions, Open Requests.

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of the Jung Home gateway (for example 192.168.1.50 or junghome.local).

register_failed.title: Registration failed
register_failed.description: The access request was not approved in time or the gateway could not be reached. Submit to try again, then approve the request in the Jung Home app under Settings, Gateway, Access Permissions, Open Requests.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthorize Jung Home
reauth_confirm.description: The gateway no longer accepts the stored access token. Approve the new access request in the Jung Home app under Settings, Gateway, Access Permissions, Open Requests.

reauth_failed.title: Reauthorization failed
reauth_failed.description: The access request was not approved in time or the gateway could not be reached. Submit to try again, then approve the request in the Jung Home app under Settings, Gateway, Access Permissions, Open Requests.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Jung Home
reconfigure.description: Update the address of your Jung Home gateway, for example after its IP address changed.

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of the Jung Home gateway (for example 192.168.1.50 or junghome.local).

progress.waiting_for_approval: Approve the access request in the Jung Home app under Settings, Gateway, Access Permissions, Open Requests.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the gateway.
error.register_failed: Registration was not completed. Make sure you approve the request in the app.

abort.already_configured: This Jung Home gateway is already configured.

auth_failed.message: The Jung Home gateway rejected the access token.

cannot_connect.message: Error communicating with the Jung Home gateway: {error}

cannot_send.message: Could not reach the Jung Home gateway to send the command; it is reconnecting. Try again in a moment.

invalid_response.message: The Jung Home gateway returned an unexpected response.

scene_not_found.message: The Jung Home scene {label} is no longer available on the gateway.
